Flat concept inventory:
- Alignment Goals | papers: 9b1f4492a663c7f56f2b43ae1ed167d3857aacca; 6f4cc536f9ed83d0dbf7e919dc609be12aa0848a; e965e93e76a9e6c4e4863d145b5c007b540d575d; a5036f31f0e629dc661f120b8c3b1f374d479ab8; f2b0017ddd77fa38760a18145e63553105a1a236; cbdb45fc16b0885905b91d84281c310e6cb49e9c; 4972b88f8f324a4fa18e921f62a9857af2b5fc7b; 17dd3555fd1ccf1141cf984347fa1b3fd6b009ca; e65b346d442e9962a4276dc1c1af2956d9d5f1eb; 06d7cb8c8816360feb33c3367073e0ef66d7d0b0; 1d26c947406173145a4665dd7ab255e03494ea28; c01e43c65a04d766e429863bdf7cf65b895df20e; a9d5d97733ccb15002ff3cfb95b0a7d8ba5236e3; ae736662f64d56f3ab1894fbd9c45f8f37251843; d318e0169f649656c71f02a1f84194a734fe1962; 2f3efe44083af91cef562c1a3451eee2f8601d22; d766bffc357127e0dc86dd69561d5aeb520d6f4c; a6fdb277d0a4b09899f802bda3359f5c2021a156; c11810fa8887b678facea62da4607c4898360308; 82a9b8984e26fdf234431459bdb445fbcfc3cb76; 5b8f0460d408a8688d9ee0cba127c779d3291d99; 7e8453fa32708b2690178c3a7a6618aba20928af; 3936fd3c6187f606c6e4e2e20b196dbc41cc4654; 0286b2736a114198b25fb5553c671c33aed5d477; 74eae12620bd1c1393e268bddcb6f129a5025166; 92930ed3560ea6c86d53cf52158bc793b089054d; d624bc273821c871f899d8256a34be40c09fc3cd; e01515c6138bc525f7aec30fc85f2adf028d4156; 22e5af80e9fd64b817efd2ec50c23b3b454f5a0d; 10391eed628dfece8a9136f76c5df53b5704422d; 65906e6027246ae9e4ecd18d6e019a24505c842e; 090648f65354977762a4624559e7f7b52ae17f58; 47f8fc90b8a977022caba627b82e492d9c588744; 5784a10804c122d09349ff4e215cd12d8b72b6aa; 6d23532a1e9a8116041fd5aac6b0ef8ddd6d8171; 3af37400f1f9a4f4f211c4a472e18963edc2b34f; bf72cfa87a5c55e430abf6d2a3d9b66eb9e1a717; 17bcb1edbe068e8fe6a97da552c70a77a15bbce7; 2ea64b7c7617f6cc1768373124ca0243d772a90f; 6ef1edae4250ae813a1d875e6941f6c03c63c904; 236c7dafea3df7ecffb5f18ec780d12f2f27d4b0; cef330bacf014d60daabbd489647b2006af130ca; bd1331b233e84bab7eba503abc60b31ac08e7881; 68c834c19cd126bbd6d25a3572d7205cfed76271; cb6cc7d28d06a0d7c0d3f0d7ee551bbc86dbc3aa; a0a79dad89857a96f8f71b14238e5237cbfc4787; 1536e8958697c5364f68b2e2448905dbbeb3a0ca; ce3b364b7e6358940ce97d8d5887a65e5024ca21; 399e7d8129c60818ee208f236c8dda17e876d21f; 382ba0c4452aab6ecdaf8a62d567bb3c4684e4f0; ce913026f693101e54d3ab9152e107034d81fce1; 77d956cdab4508d569ae5741549b78e715fd0749; 645bd6eadc247989abc5e0b0aa0be79ec8b11ea6; 7d5c661fa9a4255ee087e861f820564ea2e2bd6b; 9967cb4fd949039c6f04dd9f2f4c3331dbebe6f7; 104b0bb1da562d53cbda87aec79ef6a2827d191a; 748698bd4387afd08594e0dc8150c2afa210d9ae; 3ab661db57d924f4ff1706e05ac807873ca00e0a; 0d1c76d45afa012ded7ab741194baf142117c495; 912a39c2e0e4a35747531669cfa952d2c5627729; d8008ace077d72ccd277be795c720e9381623c10; 8a3d1ce6dd9dc9766a42e645a23de4b5f2b447ec; 534c58762e69d7afbcb0f6a7e53c07484f6d4891; a95ee39bda53cf7cbf1677d1bbac9d2be34fcc5a
- Definition | papers: 9b1f4492a663c7f56f2b43ae1ed167d3857aacca; 6f4cc536f9ed83d0dbf7e919dc609be12aa0848a; e965e93e76a9e6c4e4863d145b5c007b540d575d; a5036f31f0e629dc661f120b8c3b1f374d479ab8; f2b0017ddd77fa38760a18145e63553105a1a236; cbdb45fc16b0885905b91d84281c310e6cb49e9c; 4972b88f8f324a4fa18e921f62a9857af2b5fc7b; 17dd3555fd1ccf1141cf984347fa1b3fd6b009ca; e65b346d442e9962a4276dc1c1af2956d9d5f1eb; 06d7cb8c8816360feb33c3367073e0ef66d7d0b0; 1d26c947406173145a4665dd7ab255e03494ea28; c01e43c65a04d766e429863bdf7cf65b895df20e; a9d5d97733ccb15002ff3cfb95b0a7d8ba5236e3; ae736662f64d56f3ab1894fbd9c45f8f37251843; d318e0169f649656c71f02a1f84194a734fe1962; 2f3efe44083af91cef562c1a3451eee2f8601d22; d766bffc357127e0dc86dd69561d5aeb520d6f4c; a6fdb277d0a4b09899f802bda3359f5c2021a156; c11810fa8887b678facea62da4607c4898360308; 82a9b8984e26fdf234431459bdb445fbcfc3cb76; 5b8f0460d408a8688d9ee0cba127c779d3291d99; 7e8453fa32708b2690178c3a7a6618aba20928af; 3936fd3c6187f606c6e4e2e20b196dbc41cc4654; 0286b2736a114198b25fb5553c671c33aed5d477; 74eae12620bd1c1393e268bddcb6f129a5025166; 92930ed3560ea6c86d53cf52158bc793b089054d; d624bc273821c871f899d8256a34be40c09fc3cd; e01515c6138bc525f7aec30fc85f2adf028d4156; 22e5af80e9fd64b817efd2ec50c23b3b454f5a0d; 10391eed628dfece8a9136f76c5df53b5704422d; 65906e6027246ae9e4ecd18d6e019a24505c842e; 090648f65354977762a4624559e7f7b52ae17f58; 47f8fc90b8a977022caba627b82e492d9c588744; 5784a10804c122d09349ff4e215cd12d8b72b6aa; 6d23532a1e9a8116041fd5aac6b0ef8ddd6d8171; 3af37400f1f9a4f4f211c4a472e18963edc2b34f; bf72cfa87a5c55e430abf6d2a3d9b66eb9e1a717; 17bcb1edbe068e8fe6a97da552c70a77a15bbce7; 2ea64b7c7617f6cc1768373124ca0243d772a90f; 6ef1edae4250ae813a1d875e6941f6c03c63c904
- Human Instructions | papers: 9b1f4492a663c7f56f2b43ae1ed167d3857aacca; 6f4cc536f9ed83d0dbf7e919dc609be12aa0848a; e965e93e76a9e6c4e4863d145b5c007b540d575d; a5036f31f0e629dc661f120b8c3b1f374d479ab8; f2b0017ddd77fa38760a18145e63553105a1a236; cbdb45fc16b0885905b91d84281c310e6cb49e9c; 4972b88f8f324a4fa18e921f62a9857af2b5fc7b; 17dd3555fd1ccf1141cf984347fa1b3fd6b009ca; e65b346d442e9962a4276dc1c1af2956d9d5f1eb; 06d7cb8c8816360feb33c3367073e0ef66d7d0b0; 1d26c947406173145a4665dd7ab255e03494ea28; c01e43c65a04d766e429863bdf7cf65b895df20e; a9d5d97733ccb15002ff3cfb95b0a7d8ba5236e3

- Human Values | papers: 3936fd3c6187f606c6e4e2e20b196dbc41cc4654; 0286b2736a114198b25fb5553c671c33aed5d477; 74eae12620bd1c1393e268bddcb6f129a5025166; 92930ed3560ea6c86d53cf52158bc793b089054d; d624bc273821c871f899d8256a34be40c09fc3cd; e01515c6138bc525f7aec30fc85f2adf028d4156; 22e5af80e9fd64b817efd2ec50c23b3b454f5a0d; 10391eed628dfece8a9136f76c5df53b5704422d; 65906e6027246ae9e4ecd18d6e019a24505c842e; 090648f65354977762a4624559e7f7b52ae17f58; 47f8fc90b8a977022caba627b82e492d9c588744; 5784a10804c122d09349ff4e215cd12d8b72b6aa; 6d23532a1e9a8116041fd5aac6b0ef8ddd6d8171; 3af37400f1f9a4f4f211c4a472e18963edc2b34f; bf72cfa87a5c55e430abf6d2a3d9b66eb9e1a717; 17bcb1edbe068e8fe6a97da552c70a77a15bbce7; 2ea64b7c7617f6cc1768373124ca0243d772a90f; 6ef1edae4250ae813a1d875e6941f6c03c63c904

- Evaluation | papers: 236c7dafea3df7ecffb5f18ec780d12f2f27d4b0; e965e93e76a9e6c4e4863d145b5c007b540d575d; f2b0017ddd77fa38760a18145e63553105a1a236; cef330bacf014d60daabbd489647b2006af130ca; 17dd3555fd1ccf1141cf984347fa1b3fd6b009ca; bd1331b233e84bab7eba503abc60b31ac08e7881; 06d7cb8c8816360feb33c3367073e0ef66d7d0b0; 68c834c19cd126bbd6d25a3572d7205cfed76271; cb6cc7d28d06a0d7c0d3f0d7ee551bbc86dbc3aa; a0a79dad89857a96f8f71b14238e5237cbfc4787; 1536e8958697c5364f68b2e2448905dbbeb3a0ca; ce3b364b7e6358940ce97d8d5887a65e5024ca21; 399e7d8129c60818ee208f236c8dda17e876d21f; 382ba0c4452aab6ecdaf8a62d567bb3c4684e4f0; ce913026f693101e54d3ab9152e107034d81fce1; 77d956cdab4508d569ae5741549b78e715fd0749; 645bd6eadc247989abc5e0b0aa0be79ec8b11ea6; 7d5c661fa9a4255ee087e861f820564ea2e2bd6b; 9967cb4fd949039c6f04dd9f2f4c3331dbebe6f7; 5b8f0460d408a8688d9ee0cba127c779d3291d99; d766bffc357127e0dc86dd69561d5aeb520d6f4c; 104b0bb1da562d53cbda87aec79ef6a2827d191a; a6fdb277d0a4b09899f802bda3359f5c2021a156; 748698bd4387afd08594e0dc8150c2afa210d9ae; 3ab661db57d924f4ff1706e05ac807873ca00e0a; 0d1c76d45afa012ded7ab741194baf142117c495; 912a39c2e0e4a35747531669cfa952d2c5627729; d8008ace077d72ccd277be795c720e9381623c10; 8a3d1ce6dd9dc9766a42e645a23de4b5f2b447ec; 534c58762e69d7afbcb0f6a7e53c07484f6d4891; 0286b2736a114198b25fb5553c671c33aed5d477; a95ee39bda53cf7cbf1677d1bbac9d2be34fcc5a; 6ef1edae4250ae813a1d875e6941f6c03c63c904; 47f8fc90b8a977022caba627b82e492d9c588744; 3af37400f1f9a4f4f211c4a472e18963edc2b34f

- Human Preferences | papers: 1536e8958697c5364f68b2e2448905dbbeb3a0ca; ce3b364b7e6358940ce97d8d5887a65e5024ca21; 399e7d8129c60818ee208f236c8dda17e876d21f; 382ba0c4452aab6ecdaf8a62d567bb3c4684e4f0; ce913026f693101e54d3ab9152e107034d81fce1; 77d956cdab4508d569ae5741549b78e715fd0749; 645bd6eadc247989abc5e0b0aa0be79ec8b11ea6; 7d5c661fa9a4255ee087e861f820564ea2e2bd6b; cef330bacf014d60daabbd489647b2006af130ca; 9967cb4fd949039c6f04dd9f2f4c3331dbebe6f7; bd1331b233e84bab7eba503abc60b31ac08e7881; 5b8f0460d408a8688d9ee0cba127c779d3291d99; d766bffc357127e0dc86dd69561d5aeb520d6f4c; 104b0bb1da562d53cbda87aec79ef6a2827d191a; a6fdb277d0a4b09899f802bda3359f5c2021a156; 748698bd4387afd08594e0dc8150c2afa210d9ae; 3ab661db57d924f4ff1706e05ac807873ca00e0a; 0d1c76d45afa012ded7ab741194baf142117c495; 912a39c2e0e4a35747531669cfa952d2c5627729; d8008ace077d72ccd277be795c720e9381623c10
